[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Three vertical game selection cards are shown side by side on a dark blue and gold interface, each with a small photo preview, a small avatar badge below, and a timed label, above a centered “Mulai Game” button.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on a game menu screen displaying three selectable player/profile panels with thumbnail photos framed in rounded rectangles, each topped with small icons and a green “2ms” label, and a gold-and-blue decorative frame around each panel; a large gold button labeled “Mulai Game” sits centered at the bottom.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital UI screen, likely indoors or not applicable, with a dark background and gold accents; lighting is artificial and comes from the UI’s glowing gold elements, with no natural weather or time of day shown.

Visual Details:
The background is predominantly dark blue with curved shapes and subtle highlights. Each of the three panels has a gold metallic frame with decorative cutouts and a blue interior border. At the top of each panel is a small circular indicator on a red or white element, plus a small icon: the left panel shows a home-like symbol, while the right panel shows an X-like symbol; the middle panel shows similar top controls with unclear exact shapes due to resolution. Inside each panel, a rounded rectangle contains a small portrait photo: the left thumbnail shows a person with long dark hair near a window-like background; the middle thumbnail shows a person in dark clothing viewed from behind with another person partially visible; the right thumbnail shows a close-up portrait of faces with red-tinted tones. Under each thumbnail, white text appears: the left reads “AcaasaaSa,” the center reads “Classy 4TH,” and the right reads “Zuan De Kaizev.” Beneath each name is a gold emblem featuring a face-like or mask-like design with purple and gold highlights; the left and middle emblems look similar, while the right emblem is more purple with gold accents. A green “2ms” label appears near the top portion of each panel. At the bottom center, a gold banner-shaped button contains the text “Mulai Game” in white, with gold highlights and a ribbon-like design.

Visible Text:
AcaasaaSa
Classy 4TH
Zuan De Kaizev
2ms
Mulai Game

Practical Summary:
The image shows a game UI screen with three selectable profile panels, each containing a thumbnail photo, a name label, a gold emblem, and a green “2ms” indicator. A centered gold button labeled “Mulai Game” is displayed below the three panels.
